message:
fix(fuzz): missing OsStr import in fuzz_open_syscalls (bd-o4yda)

The fuzz_open_syscalls target referenced OsStr::from_bytes() at
line 283 but only imported CString (line 11). Build failed with
E0433 "cannot find type `OsStr`". Add OsStr to the import and
restore the build.

Verified: 298,545 fuzz runs in 31s with no crashes after the fix.
